request.prompt:
You are a precise data extraction algorithm. Analyze the following content regarding a strike from "EAV". IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS: 1. Decide if this document is actually announcing a new/upcoming strike. - If it is a cancellation/revocation of a strike, set isStrike to false. - If it is just providing information about participation (adesione) of a strike that already happened, set isStrike to false. - If it is providing real-time service updates (e.g., metro is open/closed during the strike), set isStrike to false. - ONLY set isStrike to true if it is an announcement of an upcoming strike. 2. If isStrike is true, extract the strike details: - Dates must be in 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' format. - Guaranteed times must be arrays of 'HH:mm-HH:mm' (omitted if not specified). - Location codes should be: 2-digit ISTAT for regions (e.g., "03" for Lombardia), 2-letter for provinces (e.g., "MI" for Milan), or omitted for national strikes. Example Output if NOT a strike: { "isStrike": false } Example Output if IS a strike: { "isStrike": true, "strikeData": { "startDate": "2024-12-31 08:30:00", "endDate": "2024-12-31 12:30:00", "locationType": "REGION", "locationCodes": ["12"], "guaranteedTimes": ["06:00-09:00", "18:00-21:00"] } } Input Content (Pre-processing: dom-distillation):

Context Metadata

  • Page Title: EAV Informa: Sciopero di 4 ore del 28/01/2025 - EAV srl

EAV Informa: Sciopero di 4 ore del 28/01/2025

Data:
27 Gennaio 2025

Lo sciopero previsto per domani 28 gennaio non riguarderà i servizi autobus sostitutivi che, pertanto, circoleranno regolarmente

Categoria: Trasporto pubblico

Area: Campania
